case_title: IAN SCARFE VS. NEMESIO RAMOS JR.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NEMESIO RAMOS JR. IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
